programme.title: Movie: Matilda
programme.desc: An intelligent young girl is sent away to a school with a mean principal and a very nice teacher. While there, Matilda develops her telekinetic powers and uses them to trick the mean adults in her life.

programme.title: Bones: The Big Beef at the Royal Diner
programme.desc: The remains of a popular TV celebrity chef are discovered at a local park and the Jeffersonian team must search for clues in local restaurants that he had been reviewing.

programme.title: Bones: The Lost in the Found
programme.desc: When the remains of a private high school student are discovered in a ditch, Brennan and Booth surmise that bullying was a factor. Brennan discovers similarities between her own teen years and the victim's.

programme.title: Bones: The Verdict in the Victims
programme.desc: With only 48 hours before the execution of serial killer Alex Rockwell, whom Brennan and Booth helped convict, the Jeffersonian team must race against the clock to confirm Brennan's new suspicion that Rockwell was not responsible for those crimes.

programme.title: Bones: The Murder in the Middle East
programme.desc: When a powerful member of the Iranian parliament kidnaps Arastoo to have him aid in a murder case, Booth and Cam head to Iran. The rest of the Jeffersonian team must race against the clock to help expose the killer.

programme.title: Movie: Godzilla
programme.desc: The 'world's most famous monster' is pitted against new and deadly creatures that threaten mankind's very existence. With humanity’s scientific tampering and arrogance having offset the balance of nature, Godzilla has awoken once again to regain it.

programme.title: Movie: Kong: Skull Island
programme.desc: In the 1970s, a team of explorers and soldiers are brought together to explore an uncharted island in the Pacific Ocean. When they arrive, they realize it is the home of a monstrous gorilla named Kong, who protects the island from deeper monsters.

programme.title: Arrow: Beyond Redemption
programme.desc: Laurel must deal with the repercussions of taking Sara to Nanda Parbat. Meanwhile, Oliver asks Captain Lance for a favor.

programme.title: Arrow: Haunted
programme.desc: When things take a turn for the worse with Sara, Oliver calls in a favor from an old friend who deals in the mystical: John Constantine.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: The Asset
programme.desc: Pride and his team join forces with FBI Director Isler after a Russian operative disappears after his navy escort is murdered. Also, Tammy partners with former sleeper agent Eva Azorova to locate the missing operative who Eva has known since childhood.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Dead Man Calling
programme.desc: The NCIS team investigates the copycat murder of an unsolved case from 150 years ago that spawned a legendary New Orleans ghost story.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Viral
programme.desc: Sebastian is placed on administrative leave after his response in a foot chase to apprehend a high value fugitive is questioned by the FBI. Also, while Pride and the team continue to track the target, they attempt to clear Sebastian's name.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Sister City
programme.desc: While Pride and the New Orleans team investigate a Russian sleeper agent who was involved with Abby's brother, Sebastian flies to D.C. to partner with Abby on the forensics in the case. Bishop drives through the night to deliver a package to New Orleans.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Undocumented
programme.desc: Special Agent Pride and the team investigate the murder of an immigrant petty officer that was staged as a suicide. Also, the team secretly creates an online dating profile for Special Agent Pride.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Father's Day
programme.desc: Special Agent Pride opens his bar to the public with a Fat Tuesday party, but the celebration is cut short when he and Mayor Douglas Hamilton are both kidnapped from their respective Mardi Gras events and held hostage by an unknown assailant.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: No Man's Land
programme.desc: A mystery man saves the life of a lieutenant and then disappears from the scene. Later on, the NCIS team unravels a new case when forensic evidence suggests he is a soldier who was captured in Afghanistan years ago and never found.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Second Chances
programme.desc: After tracking stolen navy TNT to a cocaine warehouse, Special Agent Pride and the team uncover a domestic ring that is producing their own cocaine and is headed by Sonja's childhood friend.

programme.title: Movie: Godzilla
programme.desc: The 'world's most famous monster' is pitted against new and deadly creatures that threaten mankind's very existence. With humanity’s scientific tampering and arrogance having offset the balance of nature, Godzilla has awoken once again to regain it.

programme.title: Movie: The Hobbit: An Unexpected Journey
programme.desc: A young Hobbit goes on a journey with a group of dwarves to the Lonely Mountain. They head out in hopes to regain the mountain as theirs again after a dragon named Smaug stole it from them.

programme.title: Movie: First Blood
programme.desc: Wandering into a small town, ex-Green Beret John Rambo is targeted, arrested and abused by the local police. When he escapes, Rambo flashes back to his time as a POW and heads into the hills, armed to the teeth and ready to take on those who hunt him.

programme.title: Movie: Rambo: First Blood Part II
programme.desc: Green Beret loner John Rambo is extricated from prison by his former superior Colonel Troutman for a top-secret operation to bring back PoWs still held in Vietnam. Teamed up with a female Viet freedom fighter, Rambo embarks on a reconnaissance mission.

programme.title: Movie: Fantastic Four
programme.desc: While doing research on a space station, Reed Richards, his girlfriend Sue Storm, his partner Ben Grimm and Sue's brother Johnny are changed by cosmic rays. They decide to use their new powers to put a stop to the plans of the evil Doctor Doom.

programme.title: Movie: Fantastic 4: Rise of the Silver Surfer
programme.desc: The Fantastic 4 face off against new foes including a planet-eating force and the Silver Surfer.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: Stalker
programme.desc: The group must defend Alexandria from a threatening, outside force.

programme.title: Talking Dead: Talking Dead On 'Stalker'
programme.desc: Thora Birch, Denise Huth and Nico Tortorella discuss the Season 10 episode of The Walking Dead, 'Stalker.'

programme.title: Better Call Saul: The Guy For This
programme.desc: Jimmy’s promotional stunt has unintended consequences. Nacho takes extreme measures to earn Lalo's trust. Saul is a success at the courthouse, but still has yet to win Kim over. Simmering with rage and self-loathing, Mike loses his temper.

programme.title: Movie: Fantastic 4: Rise of the Silver Surfer
programme.desc: The Fantastic 4 face off against new foes including a planet-eating force and the Silver Surfer.

programme.desc: A beautiful young woman must be rescued from her cruel fiancé by her one true love.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Weekend in Bangkok With Two Olympic Gymnasts
programme.desc: When Charlie agrees to watch Jake for the weekend, he quickly realizes that Jake's idea of a good time is going out for fast food and video games, which is quite different from his own ideas of fun.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Principal Gallagher's Lesbian Lover
programme.desc: When Alan is called to meet with the school principal over a picture Jake drew of a large-breasted schoolmate, he calls Charlie to watch over Jake. When Charlie doesn't respond, Alan accuses him of 'not being there for him,' and Charlie relents.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Carpet Burns and a Bite Mark
programme.desc: Charlie organizes an intervention in order to keep Alan from reuniting with his ex-wife, Judith.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Your Dismissive Attitude Toward Boobs
programme.desc: Charlie and Alan get into a power struggle when Alan allows Berta to stay at Charlie's house for a few days while her brother tries to wean himself off drugs at her place. Berta, who has an ulterior motive, plays one brother against the other.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: We Called It Mr. Pinky
programme.desc: A bout of impotence causes Charlie to re-examine his feelings toward women.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Hi, Mr. Horned One
programme.desc: Charlie thinks he's in heaven when he starts dating Isabella, a wild, sexually uninhibited woman, until Alan points out that she's bringing him much closer to hell. He's unfazed by Alan's warning until Isabella threatens to put a curse on his manhood.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Sleep Tight, Puddin' Pop
programme.desc: Charlie puts himself in a compromising position when he spends a drunken evening with his stalker, Rose. Later, he comes face-to-face with her father, who demands to know what Charlie's intentions are with his daughter.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: That Voodoo That I Do Do
programme.desc: After his overtures toward a ballet teacher are rejected, Charlie will stop at nothing to prove that he can persuade her to go out with him. When he talks Jake into taking her dance class to help his cause, his plan is derailed when Jake falls for her.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Madame and Her Special Friend
programme.desc: Alan strikes up a friendship with Charlie's elderly neighbour, Norma, only to find himself on the defensive as she tries to win his affections. Meanwhile, Charlie tries to dissuade Jake from donating money to a televangelist.

programme.title: Movie: The Killer Downstairs
programme.desc: An unsuspecting woman rents a room to a man who quickly becomes obsessed with her and threatens the people around her.

programme.title: Movie: A Neighbor's Deception
programme.desc: A young woman accepts free treatment from her neighbor, a therapist. However, she begins to realize that her neighbor's intentions may be deadly.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Legionnaires' Disease
programme.desc: History was made in Philadelphia in the summer of 1976 -- not because of the bicentennial, but because of the mysterious death of 34 Legionnaires.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Wilson Murder
programme.desc: An eye doctor is found beaten to death, by his wife. When police arrest an itinerant painter for the murder, he accuses the wife and her sister of hiring him to kill the doctor. Investigators must use forensic science to work out just what happen.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Human Sawdust
programme.desc: A suitcase leads to the gruesome discovery of a nearly perfect crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Buried Secrets
programme.desc: A fire leads investigators to re-examine an unusual death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dressed to Kill
programme.desc: When a six-year-old girl disappears without a trace, the parents become prime suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Palm Print Conviction
programme.desc: A woman leaves a bar with a stranger only to have her body discovered the next morning.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Unholy Vows
programme.desc: Some of the refugees who sought asylum in the United States after World War II lied about the atrocities in which they’d participated. Years later, a high-ranking religious figure is suspected of war crimes.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Broken Promises
programme.desc: A tape recorded by a popular gym teacher before his own death tells the true story of his strange marriage and his wife's insatiable greed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Wheel of Misfortune
programme.desc: A woman's disappearance is tracked by a casino's security cameras. Investigators collect enough evidence left behind from the victim to inform them of who was responsible and how she disappeared.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Quite a Spectacle
programme.desc: In possibly the strangest case in the history of forensic science, investigators must solve a murder case with a list of evidence consisting entirely of a single squashed tomato left at the crime scene, and tiny reflections of light in a photograph.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Writer's Block
programme.desc: An architect became ill and died just before she was to testify in a criminal trial.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Clean Getaway
programme.desc: An employee of a dry-cleaner was raped and murdered in the store with two eyewitnesses.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Killing Room
programme.desc: Investigators faced a daunting task: to prove Scott Dunn had been murdered, even though they had no body, no weapon, and no witnesses.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ultimate Betrayal
programme.desc: Fire sweeps through a mansion, killing two children, all evidence leads to the mother.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Slippery Motives
programme.desc: While staying at a hotel in St. Louis, Missouri, a Louisiana woman drowns in a bathtub. Her husband claims it was an accident, but detectives are skeptical as they discover evidence of foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Badge of Deceit
programme.desc: Women in a small Louisiana city live in fear of a rapist who becomes so experienced he leaves no clues to his identity. But computer technology and behavioral science combine to give police a new forensic tool: geographical profiling.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Bag of Evidence
programme.desc: When a 9-year old girl disappears, an anonymous caller leads police to her body.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All Charged Up
programme.desc: Philadelphia authorities use an anonymous letter to locate a perpetrator.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bad Blood
programme.desc: A young doctor in a rural community is accused of sedating and sexually assaulting two of his female patients. DNA tests demonstrate that the doctor is innocent, but the women continue to insist that he sedated and raped them.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pure Evil
programme.desc: In 1993, two Texas teenagers, a 14-year-old boy and his 13-year-old stepsister, were brutally murdered. It took forensic evidence and a behavioral profile to identify their killer as Jason Massey, who had a history of torturing animals.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Green Pen
programme.desc: When a Yale student mysteriously vanishes days before her wedding investigators comb a secure research lab for clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: On the Rocks
programme.desc: The naked body of a young woman is discovered in a remote area leading forensic investigators on a search for clues to her identity and the identity of her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cement the Case
programme.desc: A man confesses to killing his wife, but forensic evidence may lead to another suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Innocence Lost
programme.desc: Five-year-old Melissa Brannen disappeared from a Christmas party in 1989. The fibers on her clothes were the only means for police to determine her abductor.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Beaten by a Hair
programme.desc: Laura Houghteling left her Bethesda home and walked to the station to take a train to work. A peculiar strand of hair found in Laura's hairbrush enabled investigators to unravel the mystery of her disappearance.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Crime Seen
programme.desc: After years in prison, Edward Honaker finally found someone who believed him, and was willing to pay for DNA testing which could prove he was innocent.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Unholy Vows

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pinned by the Evidence
programme.desc: A street fight takes the life of a wrestler. A jury believes the accused killed in cold blood. He gets sentenced to twenty years in prison. Six years later, he is granted another trial when a forensic animator offers a different explanation.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Human Sawdust
programme.desc: A suitcase leads to the gruesome discovery of a nearly perfect crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Four on the Floor

programme.title: Gold Rush: Rebellion at Duncan Creek
programme.desc: A machine failure leads to an explosive uprising on Rick's claim. Parker's crew races to build a mountain of pay dirt. Fred taps out Thunder Falls with his biggest gold haul. Dustin hits the nugget jackpot. The Dirt returns with the Milwaukee boys.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Frozen Treasure
programme.desc: A huge mistake threatens Rick's operation and Monica hopes her ground has thawed.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Pay Dirt: Rally in the Valley
programme.desc: With insider facts and bonus scenes: Rick hits a gold layer that may save his season, and Parker's crew takes a risk in Death Valley. Meanwhile, Tony turns a corner.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Last Gold
programme.desc: At the end of his season Parker closes in on a record gold total. Rick rolls the dice on a new piece of ground. Tony turns to Hunker Creek for a final score. In Montana, Dozer Dave tries to solve a gold mystery. Parker, Tony, Rick reveal all on The Dirt.

programme.title: Outback Opal Hunters: Blue Fire Opal or Bust
programme.desc: Justin recruits his fiancée Becky to save him from financial ruin. The Fire Crew face deadly reptiles and a snapped suspension in search blue fire opal. The Cooke Brothers go 21 metres under, desperate to get their hands on the first opal of the season.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Last Gold

programme.title: Legendary Locations: Cults of Personality
programme.desc: Josh explores three locations where people connect with spirits and miracles, from a celebration honoring a mysterious American soldier on a remote Pacific island to portal to the dead in New Orleans.

programme.desc: Capt. Billy and wild man Geoff Page join for a total inches challenge, with snook, redfish and trout.

programme.title: Addictive Fishing: Off the Hook
programme.desc: Blair talks about the STAR tournament with the Mogan Man contest winner and Ryan Lambert in Louisiana.

programme.title: The Next Bite: Fly By Night: Hit Stick Baits for Big Fall Walleye
programme.desc: A professional tournament angler and tackle developer puts the final touches on a brand new bait for walleye.

programme.title: Out Da Bayou: Breaking the River Mold
programme.desc: We relive the best of walking the rivers of South Louisiana catching Red Eye Kentucky Bass.

programme.title: Chasin' the Sun: Beach Red Tarpon
programme.desc: With the annual tarpon migration about to happen, Justin and his friend get distracted trying to find a school of redfish off Panama City Beach.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Wind Farm Technician
programme.desc: Mike Rowe heads to an Oklahoma wind farm and learns that going green sometimes means you've got to get brown first.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Alligator Egg Collector
programme.desc: Mike Rowe gets dirty as he forages the swamps of Louisiana in search of alligator eggs 90,000 of them to be exact. It's a job that is helping to preserve the population of the American alligator.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Bug Breeder
programme.desc: Mike gets dirty with some fainting goats, breeding exotic insects, while helping to remove tree stumps. Mike decides to take on the dirty jobs that other do day in and day out.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Animal Control Specialist
programme.desc: Mike heads to California to work as an Animal Control Specialist by removing skunks and other rodents from under people's houses.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Sheep Castrator
programme.desc: Mike works at an automobile dealership where the job is sawing down a giant concrete wall to make room for a new washbay, then heads to a sheep farm where he tries his hand at sheep shearing & castrating before getting treated to Rocky Mountain Oysters.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Medical Waste
programme.desc: Mike travels to Sioux Falls and South Dakota to spend the day working as a medical waste processor.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Mud Mineral Excavator
programme.desc: Mike Rowe gets dirty at a California mineral mine where everything seems to go wrong. Then he heads to a South Carolina rice plantation where he masters the art of milling rice.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: Somewhere in My Pile
programme.desc: Beverly's clutter fills every last square inch of her home. Upstairs, her three beloved dogs have made the space absolutely unlivable. With the threat of the city condemning her home, Beverly must clear the hoard or risk losing everything.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: New Beginnings
programme.desc: Katie, who survived a double lung transplant, is looking for the perfect dress to celebrate her new beginning. Molly is a debutante looking for a dress to signal her transition into womanhood.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: A Mother's Touch
programme.desc: Dana is looking for her dream dress that her recently departed mother would approve of. Katy wants to add fabric from her late mother's gown to her dress.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: More Than a Wedding

programme.desc: Find out why the food court was picked for the 'stalk and text' challenge, what classic comedy inspired 'over the shoulder,' and who was lucky enough to test out the flying contraption for Joe the Genie.

programme.title: It's Personal With Amy Hoggart: Miami
programme.desc: Amy flies her body to Miami to help Livi, a college student who is struggling. Together, they experience all that Miami has to offer: dancing, food, double decker bus and a hurricane.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Dover and Out
programme.desc: The guys survey employees with odd questions, and tonight's loser unveils a mural in a small town whose residents react with big city rage.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Marathon Man
programme.desc: Find out which joker has pet parakeets, why the crew had to work in a truck down the block while filming at a bagel shop and who got to sound the start horn for Murr's race across the Brooklyn Bridge.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Guilty as Charged

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: No Good Deed
programme.desc: Find out what after-school activity Joe's mom forbid him from doing, why filming nearly halted during the jack asses challenge and what last minute idea made it into Sal and Joe's charity funds punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Indecent Proposal

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Turning the Tables

programme.title: Sex and the City: The Good Fight
programme.desc: Once Aidan moves in to her apartment, Carrie feels crowded. Meanwhile, Samantha is unnerved when she realizes she is falling in love with her boss. Elsewhere, Miranda is worried that having sex will hurt the baby.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Change of a Dress
programme.desc: When Carrie tells Aidan she wants to take things slower, he refuses to give her time and moves out of their apartment the following day. Meanwhile, the monogamy bug bites Samantha when she finds out Richard is sleeping with other women.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Home and Away
programme.desc: Guy tries favourites in Chicago, a Peruvian place and visits Oklahoma City.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: And the Kicker Is
programme.desc: Guy Fieri visits a restaurant in Columbia with homemade patties, a corner store in Buffalo serving everything with a side of homemade bread and a diner that's redefining scrapple in Berkeley.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Surf 'n Turf
programme.desc: Guy checks out his own take on surf and surf in Mayport, Florida.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Signature Twists
programme.desc: Guy visits unique comfort food places, such as the dog-friendly neighbourhood joint that serves the Barking Lard BLT.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Flavortown Medley
programme.desc: A Memphis bar-turned-bistro offers low brow favourites; a food truck in Hawaii.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Oldies but Goodies
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's hitting up some legit local landmarks. In Des Moines, a historic drive-in is famous for its nearly century-old chili recipe. In Leeds Point, N.J., a scenic seaside joint has served up fresh catch since the '30s.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Old Standards, New Styles
programme.desc: This trip, Guy is hitting up spots serving comfort food that has been turned up a notch. In Long Beach, CA., and old school diner with a new chef is cooking some home-style classics.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Port to Port
programme.desc: Guy's going from Portsmouth, New Hampshire to Portland, Ore. for righteous coast-to-coast flavor. In Oregon, a Spanish spot serving outrageous octopus and an homage to the chef's childhood.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Standout Seafood
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's reeling in all kinds of standout seafood! There's a restaurant-market in Vancouver that's combining sustainability with killer cooking including their bouillabaisse and salmon fish and chips.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Meaty Mashup
programme.desc: In Little Rock, Ark., an old gas station-turned-eatery is pumpin' bison into a burrito and pilin' pork onto cornmeal waffles. In Santa Rosa, CA, a Vietnamese joint makes phenomenal pho and righteous barbecue pork.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Mom and Dad
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri's hanging out at real-deal mom-and-pop spots. In Logan, Utah, a family-run Indian joint hooked up to a gas station with Dad dishin' out specialties from his homeland.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Pizza Plus
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri is divin' into the pie and other major mouthfuls. In Boston, a joint putting beer into their crust and then topping it with taco fixins and a steak-and-cola combo.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Guy's All-Star Guests
programme.desc: Guy Fieri has a rock-star lineup kickin' it with him in the kitchen. First, in Kansas City, Mo., Chiefs' head coach Andy Reid tackles pigskin at a joint meticulous about their meat.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: International Infusion
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's grabbing grub infused with international flavours. There's a meaty spot in Wilmington, Delaware, putting Thai into sausage and Cuban into sandwiches.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Cultural Cookin'
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is getting culture shock, starting with a French-inspired Hawaiian hot spot transformed from a hole-in-the-wall lunch counter to a dine-in destination.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Burgers, Buns and Bagels
programme.desc: Guy's picking up everything from burgers to buns to bagels. In Portsmouth, New Hampshire, an amped up deli serves lights-out lamb burgers and righteous ribs. In Los Angeles, a Koreatown favourite loads up Asian buns and has a unique bacon-corn bar dish.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Never Too Late
programme.desc: Lizzy tries to track down the owner of a dog tied up outside the rescue. An older couple comes looking for their first dog, but their choice requires some special temperament testing. And, when a dog develops allergies, Mariah looks for a natural cure.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Here in Their Golden Years
programme.desc: Wanting to give the senior dogs a special place, Lizzy, Tania, and Mariah create a 'retirement center' at one of the warehouses.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Saved from the Fight

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Escaping Death

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: The Villalobos Bowl

programme.desc: The Bermuda Triangle has been cursed by strange disappearances and unexplained alien sightings, and a new investigation uncovers the true secrets of this deadly area.

programme.title: The Menendez Murders: Erik Tells All: A Family With a Dirty Secret

programme.title: Look Who's Stalking
programme.desc: Two innocent teenage girls are targeted by obsessed stalkers. One manages to survive, and after police raid her stalker's home, he's sent to prison. The other had no idea she had a stalker until he killed her, then himself.

programme.title: Look Who's Stalking
programme.desc: A man takes cyber-stalking to a whole new level by sending hundreds of threatening messages and posting over 40 videos on social media that document his twisted fixation for a former high school classmate.

programme.title: Evil Stepmothers: As Bad as It Gets
programme.desc: 41-year old Carol Krizan seems like the perfect match for downhearted divorcee, Roy Joe McCaleb. But when Roy is killed in his bed by an alleged prowler and Carol walks away scot-free, Roy’s family thinks she may have something to do with his murder.

programme.title: Evil Stepmothers: As Bad as It Gets
programme.desc: 41-year old Carol Krizan seems like the perfect match for downhearted divorcee, Roy Joe McCaleb. But when Roy is killed in his bed by an alleged prowler and Carol walks away scot-free, Roy’s family thinks she may have something to do with his murder.

programme.title: Evil Stepmothers: Caught in Her Crosshairs

programme.title: Evil Stepmothers: Beyond Repair
programme.desc: Twenty-six year old blonde beauty, Leah Ward, brings sparkle back into the eyes of 40-year old divorcee and entrepreneur, Ejaz Ahmad. But when Ejaz disappears only months later, it's his young son who leads the path to a grisly discovery and murder.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Some Like It Dead

programme.title: Young, Hot, and Deadly: Casey Anthony Part 2
programme.desc: With the world watching, Casey Anthony's trial begins. Shocking claims are presented by the defense and the prosecution pieces together forensic evidence they believe proves Casey was responsible for murdering her daughter.

programme.title: Young, Hot, and Deadly: Casey Anthony Part 3
programme.desc: The defense challenges the forensic evidence and the jury delivers a verdict that sparks outrage.

programme.title: Dead Silent: Picture of Evil
programme.desc: A picture-perfect dinner for two dissolves into a nightmare for University of Arkansas at Pine Bluff sophomore and cheerleader Dominique 'Nicky' Hurd and a fellow classmate after they become the targets of a deranged predator.

programme.title: Dead Silent: Madness on the Lake
programme.desc: The remote lakeside town of Bayview, Idaho is a little too quiet for local resident Larry Cragun, and soon the isolation gets to him.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Memphis Blues
programme.desc: In July of 2010, NBA star and family man Lorenzen Wright goes missing outside of Memphis, TN. When his dead body is discovered in the woods, investigators find that this case is far from a slam dunk.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Law and Murder
programme.desc: A double murder involving the family of a federal judge will lead the FBI, US Marshals and Chicago PD on an investigation of epic proportions. But when law enforcement finds the end of the trail, they learn the death count may climb higher.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: The Cheerleader and the Hitman
programme.desc: When a widower and father of three is found dead outside his Long Island home, police have reason to believe shady business dealings may have caused his murder. But then a tip leads to three unlikely suspects, exposing dark family secrets.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Oklahoma Horror Story
programme.desc: Just before Thanksgiving in Oklahoma City, a husband and wife are at home when two masked gunmen allegedly ambush them and kill the husband. With few leads, police use ballistics, forensics and neighborhood gossip to solve this cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Suburban Secrets
programme.desc: When doting mother, Cheryl Coker, vanishes from Riverside, Ohio on October 2nd 2018 numerous search efforts come up empty. But as police take a closer look at the case, they uncover some disturbing information.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Motor City Murder
programme.desc: In 1970's Detroit, a senseless murder rocks the African-American neighbourhood of the North End. Police think they've got the perpetrators and a jury agrees. But it will take 47 years for the truth to finally emerge and right history's wrongs.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Bittersweet Sixteen
programme.desc: Angela Allen joins a social networking site where she soon falls in love. After weeks of texting, they decide to meet in person. Their first meeting seems to trouble Angela, but when she goes out for a second time, she never comes home.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Sender: Unknown
programme.desc: 12-year-old Justin Bloxom is addicted to MySpace and attached to his cell phone. One night, Justin sneaks out of a friend's house to meet a new friend, but never returns. The investigation unravels a tangled web of fake identities and false promises.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Webcam of Lies
programme.desc: When a hopeful 12-year-old singer looks for fame online using her webcam, she gathers many admirers, and soon finds a boy who flatters her so much she falls for him. But her dreams become her worst nightmare when a shocking photo is shared online.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Blast from the Past
programme.desc: 38-year-old Michele Reiter's life seems to be on the up after a chaotic marriage and a troubled romance. But when Michele goes missing after accepting a date from a new Facebook friend, a horrific story unfolds.

programme.title: The Last Don
programme.desc: Joe Massino, the 'Last Don', crushes anyone who goes against the mafia code of omerta. Loyalty to his family, and obedience to their code of silence, is everything. But when the Feds take Massino down, Massino takes everyone down with him.

programme.title: The Mafia Kingpin
programme.desc: Arnold Rothstein schooled the founders of the American Mafia in the ways of organized crime during the 1920s and the the model for running crime business.

programme.title: Bugsy Siegel: Godfather of Vegas
programme.desc: Bugsy Siegel, the Jewish gangster with charm and a killer's instinct, plays hard and dreams big. He's got a vision to build a gambling mecca in the Nevada desert; but when he stops playing by the Mafia's rules, Bugsy pays the ultimate price.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Be a Car Salesman
programme.desc: An ex-con rebuilds his reputation as a successful car salesman until a freak accident threatens to send him back to jail.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT to Be Part of the Pittsburgh Six
programme.desc: Andrew Heim is doing time for assault at Western Penitentiary in Pennsylvania. When a prison buddy finds a way to tunnel out of the prison Heim and five other inmates escape. The group is dubbed 'The Pittsburgh Six' and sparks a nationwide manhunt.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT to Taunt the Cops
programme.desc: Jimmy Maxwell is no stranger to prison life. But every time he gets arrested, he outsmarts officials and escapes. His go-for-broke nature makes him a menace for authorities, who come face to face with his volatile nature each time they corner him.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Pose as Katrina Refugees
programme.desc: After killing his mother, Scott Webb and his wife go on the run. They head to Texas and fool a small-town church into taking pity on them. But when their story hits the local news, church members call police, who track the couple down in Seattle.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Caught in a Love Triangle
programme.desc: Henry Lee Marshall is obsessed with Martha Leathers, and in a fit of jealousy, kills her husband and flees. Unable to stay away for long, Marshall returns to harass her. Finally, after nine years of stalking Martha, his time on the run comes to an end.

programme.title: Rustic Renovation: Rustic on the River
programme.desc: Brock and Chase tackle an old river cabin and transform the living space with timber beams, wood floors and a custom entertainment center. Then, a wood slat wall defines the space and is accented by a walnut kitchen island with hand wrought metal legs.

programme.title: Rustic Renovation: Time Capsule Cabin
programme.desc: Brock and Chase update a fourth-generation family cabin on Lake Charlotte, Minnesota. They give one room a bigger feel with new paint and a custom barn wood-framed window, and a breakfast nook adds a great space for family gatherings.

programme.title: Rustic Renovation: Open Concept Cabin
programme.desc: Chase and Brock transform a 1950s cabin to give a family the entertaining space they've always wanted. They remove paneling and knock down walls to create an open kitchen. They replace old carpet with new flooring that's perfect for going barefoot.

programme.title: Rustic Renovation: Quonset Hut to Guest House
programme.desc: The guys use reclaimed materials to create bright and functional guest quarters in the dark, unsafe storage space of a World War II Quonset hut. The sleeping area features custom beds, and the kitchen is build out with butcher block countertops.

programme.title: Rustic Renovation: Lakeside Scenic Porch Redo
programme.desc: Chase and Brock transform an uninviting, rarely used porch into a warm and rustic family gathering space. They add reclaimed barn wood to the ceiling, rough-sawn hardwood flooring and a huge sliding door looking toward the lake.

programme.title: Rustic Renovation: Nisswa Cabin

programme.title: Restored: Mystery of the English Cottage
programme.desc: A young family has purchased a 1920s English cottage in Redlands, California, for their forever home. Something is funky with the living room and they can't figure out what. Brett solves the mystery, removing all the 1970s additions.

programme.title: Restored: 1923 Mediterranean Revival
programme.desc: Brett's new clients recently purchased their first home together, a 1923 Mediterranean Revival, and want to restore it after years of small updates from the previous owners.

programme.title: Movie: Sister of the Bride
programme.desc: A couple in love have a quick courtship and soon announce their engagement. While the couple are over the moon with the prospect of being married, their families think they are moving too quickly.

programme.title: Movie: A Country Wedding
programme.desc: A country western star returns to his hometown to sell his childhood home. Upon his arrival, he meets the girl he proposed to when he was eight. Faced with old feelings, he will discover what really matters in life.

programme.title: Movie: Love on Safari
programme.desc: When a woman inherits a wildlife reserve in South Africa, she travels there to meet with the head Ranger. Upon learning that the park is in financial jeopardy, and may have to be sold to her uncle's competitor, he urges her to take on a Safari.

programme.title: Movie: Rome in Love
programme.desc: An unknown actress lands the role of a lifetime in Rome. Paired with an American journalist writing a profile, she will discover surprises about love and life in the eternal city.

programme.title: Movie: Love on Iceland
programme.desc: A woman gathers her college travel group together for a trip to Iceland. Her ex is part of this group and shows up uninvited, and shows her exactly what she is missing since their breakup.

programme.title: Movie: Love at First Dance
programme.desc: A woman is tasked with teaching Manhattan's former 'Most Eligible Bachelor' how to dance for his extravagant, society wedding. But as the dance lessons progress, complications ensue when feelings begin to develop between them.

programme.title: Movie: The Convenient Groom
programme.desc: A young celebrity marriage counselor is left at the altar of her own publicized wedding. To save face, she accepts an offer from her contractor, who steps in as a groom and marries her.

programme.title: Movie: Hearts of Winter
programme.desc: An interior designer brings new life to the house of a widower and his daughter and finds love in the process.

programme.title: Movie: A Harvest Wedding
programme.desc: A wedding planner in New York is hired to plan the most anticipated wedding of the season. But the bride wants the wedding to be on the family farm which is now being run by her older brother who happens to be her ex.

programme.title: Movie: Paris, Wine and Romance
programme.desc: A winery owner travels to Paris for a major wine competition. She hopes her latest vintage will bring her numerous awards and accolades so she can make her father proud. While at the competition, she meets a man and starts a Parisian romance.

programme.title: Movie: Bad Date Chronicles
programme.desc: Leigh runs the website Bad Date Chronicles, for people to anonymously post horrible date experiences.

programme.title: Movie: Over the Moon in Love

programme.desc: Police suspect a man in a hit and run, but he leased the car in question to someone in another state. Police found the vehicle and took it apart, uncovering evidence telling them just what happened.

programme.desc: The medical examiner ruled the death an accident, but the detectives investigating the case thought the evidence at the scene indicated otherwise. It would take three years, an exhumation and a second autopsy to determine who was right.

programme.desc: While staying at a hotel in St. Louis, Missouri, a Louisiana woman drowns in a bathtub. Her husband claims it was an accident, but detectives are skeptical as they discover evidence of foul play.

programme.desc: Women in a small Louisiana city live in fear of a rapist who becomes so experienced he leaves no clues to his identity. But computer technology and behavioral science combine to give police a new forensic tool: geographical profiling.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Mannequin Factory
programme.desc: Mike finds himself at the Windsorland Mobile Home Park where homes are being broken down to make room for a new shopping center, and then he heads off to Patina-V where he learns that making mannequins is not only a dirty job, but a form of art as well.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Samurai Sword of Power
programme.desc: Josh explores ancient shrines hidden in the mountains and underground tunnels across Japan in search for the missing mystical Honjo sword. Along the way, Josh learns the ways of the samurai and forges his own samurai sword.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Chasing the Fortune of Sir Francis Drake
programme.desc: Josh Gates searches land and sea for the lost fortune of legendary pirate, Sir Francis Drake. Joining treasure hunters and maritime archaeologists, Josh hunts for a lost cache of Spanish gold and the remains of Drake himself.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: The Real Robin Hood
programme.desc: Josh criss-crosses the English countryside in search of the real Robin Hood.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Rediscovered: Norse Code, Celtic Legend
programme.desc: Josh Gates investigates how a group of Norse tribesman rose to power in medieval Europe. Searching across England, he uncovers a cache of ancient treasure as he chases the legendary Celtic queen who nearly defeated the invading Roman army 2,000 years ago.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: D-Day Uncovered
programme.desc: In a season premiere event, Josh Gates touches down in Normandy to investigate battles on land, air and sea. The expedition reveals a Nazi threat greater than ever imagined, unearthing a massive German bunker complex buried for 75 years.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: D-Day Uncovered
programme.desc: In a season premiere event, Josh Gates touches down in Normandy to investigate battles on land, air and sea. The expedition reveals a Nazi threat greater than ever imagined, unearthing a massive German bunker complex buried for 75 years.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Rediscovered: The Ark and The Skull
programme.desc: Josh Gates takes on the jungles of Central America to investigate the legendary crystal skull discovered by a renowned adventurer who was the inspiration for Indiana Jones. Then Josh searches for an iconic relic.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Secrets of Brother XII
programme.desc: Josh Gates attempts to uncover a treasure left behind by the Aquarian Foundation, an isolated, insidious cult led by the notorious leader known as Brother XII.

programme.title: Legendary Locations: Monuments, Mountains and Monsters

programme.title: The Fish Guyz: Welcome Home!

programme.desc: Jared and Tim Borski fish for sharks in the Keys.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Searching For America's Lost Flight

programme.title: World's Wildest Weather: Monster Typhoon
programme.desc: Discover a family business which was destroyed by the flooding in the UK in 2015.

programme.title: World's Wildest Weather: Cyclone Bomb
programme.desc: A huge cruise liner is caught up in a terrifying bomb cyclone off the East Coast of America; record breaking waves on the West Coast of Portugal where surfers risk it all for the chance ride the big one.

programme.title: World's Wildest Weather: Hurricane Highway

programme.title: Highway Thru Hell: Door to Door

programme.title: Heavy Rescue: 401: Free the Highway
programme.desc: The OPP must organize recovery crews when a 70-vehicle whiteout crash shuts down Highway 400. The Sarnia team struggles to recover a trailer without losing the load.

programme.title: Why Planes Crash: Fatal Flaws
programme.desc: Learn about three catastrophic accidents that led to major changes in the aviation industry.

programme.title: Why Planes Crash: Severe Weather
programme.desc: Featuring thunderstorms, wind shear and microbursts that can bring down a plane.

programme.title: Why Planes Crash: Crisis in the Cockpit
programme.desc: Before 'Crew Resource Management,' the Captain was looked at quite highly and was not to be challenged, even if crew members felt he was wrong. But before the program was enacted, many planes crashed.

programme.title: So You Think You'd Survive?: Tornados and Killer Bees
programme.desc: What do you do when a tornado is about to strike? Could you survive an attack of killer bees? Incredible caught-on-tape moments challenge you with live power lines, dangerous sinkholes, enormous blizzards, massive landslides and vicious sunburns!

programme.title: So You Think You'd Survive?: Rip Currents and Lightning
programme.desc: What would you do if a volcano erupts in front of you? How would you survive a deadly rip current? Harrowing caught-on-camera video pits you against broken water mains, deadly lightning, dangerous hot air balloon crashes, and giant tsunamis!

programme.title: So You Think You'd Survive?: Avalanches and Jellyfish
programme.desc: Looking at the possibilities of surviving a massive avalanche, as well as a terrible sting from a jellyfish. Also featuring footage on deathly heat in the desert, white-water rapids and much more.

programme.title: AMHQ Weekend
programme.desc: The science and stories of weather, plus in-depth forecasts with a focus on weekend weather.

programme.title: Weekend Recharge

programme.title: Secrets of the Earth: Man-Made Earthquakes

programme.title: Mayday: Flight 574: Lost

programme.title: Hoarders: Mary Lynn
programme.desc: Mary Lynn's 14 year-old-son Jacob would rather be in foster care than live with his own mother in her hoarded house. He fabricated a story about his mother beating him as a means of getting CPS involved. If she doesn't progress, she could lose her son.

programme.title: Hoarders: Arline/ Carolyn
programme.desc: Arline's hoard has reached such immense proportions that her husband has been sleeping in his car each night to recover from surgery. Carolyn's family will press charges if she doesn't return stolen items.

programme.title: Hoarders: Ron/ Carol
programme.desc: Ron's home is filled from top to bottom with paper--books, old newspapers and more. Carol has been sleeping in a hoarded truck parked in front of her condemned hoarded house.

programme.title: Hoarders: Becky/ Clare
programme.desc: Becky's hoard fills 16 separate storage units and the monthly fees have put her into debt. Clare was forced by the Sheriff's Department to undergo involuntary mental exams and was banned from her own property until it is cleaned.

programme.title: Hoarders: Stacey/ Roi
programme.desc: Stacey has two days to get rid of the 47 dogs and cats that have taken over her house, or she may lose both her daughter and her home. Roi has been evicted from his home, as there are too many dangerous hazards there.

programme.title: Hoarders: Sandy and Len
programme.desc: Len lives in a home stuffed full of garbage bags where he keeps all his belongings. If he doesn't clean up, his family fears his house will kill him.

programme.title: Hoarders: Ellen and Gloria
programme.desc: The tragic loss of Ellen's husband in the line of duty triggered hoarding through kleptomania. Gloria's family is on the verge of calling the sheriff.

programme.title: Movie: Salt
programme.desc: A highly regarded CIA agent, accused of being a Russian spy by a defector, goes on the run to protect her husband. The agent's superiors refuse to believe she's leading a double life until her actions begin to raise doubts.

programme.title: Movie: The Transporter
programme.desc: An outlaw finds his life becoming all the more dangerous when he turns against a gang of criminals.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Art Attack
programme.desc: Find out why hair dryers are banned from the set, what moment has become a fan and crew classic, and how Murr's blankie wound up on the show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Birds and the Bees
programme.desc: Learn what has become a signature part of Q's wardrobe and who among the Jokers is considered the best dancer. Plus, find out which character made his first appearance on an early episode of the show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: To Hatch a Predator
programme.desc: A last-minute prop request that caused a scramble, where Murr’s fetching housecoat came from, and who was offered a job at the children’s museum following Q’s turtle punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Truth Hurts
programme.desc: Find out which challenge became an instant classic, what act of kindness blew the crew away and what word the Jokers are responsible for in Urban Dictionary.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Psychotic Not-Line
programme.desc: Learn what phrase the cast and crew use to crack each other up, find out which Joker burned himself during a challenge and what has become a signature line in the show's opening.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Out of Fashion
programme.desc: Find out what challenge needed to be cancelled and rescheduled three times, and why some people didn't want to be included in the show. Plus, learn what questions the guys prepared that didn't make the cut.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: It's Electric
programme.desc: The guys pitch whimsical TV show idea to focus groups and then go to the park with their 'daughters' who share unpopular opinions. The loser heads to the spa for an electrifying punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: After Party: It's Electric
programme.desc: Murr and Joe sit down with Joey Fatone to discuss the best moments of the season. They reveal their favorite moments and never-before-seen footage.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Take Me Out at the Ballgame
programme.desc: The guys get drenched at a water park, and tonight's loser strikes out while jockeying for a ball from Mets pitcher Noah Syndergaard.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Party Crasher
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr dodge shakedowns with the help of some strangers, and tonight's loser has a run-in at a party that leaves him down for the count.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Guilty as Charged
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q enlist shoppers to help them avoid a rogue security guard, and tonight's big loser faces the wrath of a crowd of rockers.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Needy and the Greedy
programme.desc: The guys have fast fingers at a focus group and leave no cereal box unturned at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser opens a can of something fierce at a local donation center.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Silence of the Lame
programme.desc: It's all play and no work when the guys square off in a toy-pitching competition. And tonight's big loser has to quiet down patrons in a food court.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Stripteased
programme.desc: Murr, Joe, Q and Sal return to the dentist's office, then try to make each other laugh in a food court tournament. Then, the big loser strips for a rowdy group of ladies who will never be able to un-see the sorry state of his skin.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Rock Botton
programme.desc: The guys 'do the farts' with actor Jeff Daniels, and then try to get strangers to take their sides in ridiculous arguments. Later, tonight's loser finds himself up against a wall around a group of college students.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Down in the Dump
programme.desc: Find out what objects other than pencils the Jokers have considered putting on people, and whose sister frequently helps on the show. Plus, learn what prop has become a fan favorite.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Hump Day
programme.desc: Learn how the crew attracted more customers to eat at GRK, what piece of iconic 'Jokers' history was made in this same focus group space and who caused several delays in the filming of Q's zoo punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Autograph Corrector
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes to find out questions and trivia like why Q wore a wedding ring during a challenge, which crew member slapped him way too hard, and who has a history with the punishment guest.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Rock Botton
programme.desc: The guys 'do the farts' with actor Jeff Daniels, and then try to get strangers to take their sides in ridiculous arguments. Later, tonight's loser finds himself up against a wall around a group of college students.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Down in the Dump
programme.desc: Find out what objects other than pencils the Jokers have considered putting on people, and whose sister frequently helps on the show. Plus, learn what prop has become a fan favorite.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Walking Dread
programme.desc: Find out which joker has a black thumb, what challenges the guys like so much they play when the cameras are off, and how long it took to zombie-fry the undead in Sal's sewer punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Car Sick
programme.desc: Find out what celebrity Sal wrote fan letters to as a kid, which grocery game is Murr's favourite, how the guys found sloppy Joe and who helped Q's first jeep punishment a milky mess.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Murder
programme.desc: Adam shines a headlight on why drivers are rarely prosecuted for car accidents that result in death. He breaks down border patrol's problematic search policies and examines the messed-up history of corpses and medical studies.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Music
programme.desc: It's time to face the music, as Adam reveals the racism behind rock & roll's origins and the egregious fees of Live Nation's monopoly. He then defends musicians who 'sell out' to make a living in today's digital landscape.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Cops
programme.desc: Adam looks at the truth behind the overuse of SWAT Teams, illustrates how using school officers can create a pipeline for prisons, and examines the origins and intended purpose of police officers.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Himself
programme.desc: In the season finale, Adam battles with his inner self-doubt over how biases affect the show. He then explores the shortcomings of storytelling and the influence (or lack thereof) of advertising on the integrity of the series.

programme.title: TruTV's Top Funniest: Fails, Falls, and Follie
programme.desc: Find out what happens when a reporter gets busted ordering at a drive-thru on live TV.

programme.title: TruTV's Top Funniest: Laugh Riot
programme.desc: Learn how to play the most epic game of mattress dominos ever, and see why staircase sledding never gets old.

programme.title: TruTV's Top Funniest: World Wide Whackos
programme.desc: Find out how a little eye makeup can help you pull off a prank that's both hilarious and scary. Plus, watch things go downhill in a hurry when people try to back that thang up.

programme.title: TruTV's Top Funniest: Bungling Boneheads
programme.desc: Discover why reading while roller blading and the ice bucket challenge don't always go as planned. Also, find out that it is possible to fall through a trampoline.

programme.title: TruTV's Top Funniest: All Flubbed Up
programme.desc: Watch a woman with seemingly magical powers disrupt an ordinary coffee shop.

programme.desc: Amy Sedaris applies her distinctive brand of silliness to a mash-up talk show format.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Hell on Wheels

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Who Arted
programme.desc: Find out why the Jokers wore Bluetooth earpieces for a challenge, how the crew finds focus group participants and why the punishment shoot was almost canceled.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Starfart Macchiato
programme.desc: Find out what game the Jokers have played five times throughout the show's history, and how the crew got poison ivy. Plus, learn what game the Jokers played that had them asking for extra turns.

programme.desc: Mike and Cherita started their family-run restaurant, Blue Orleans in Chattanooga, after losing everything in Hurricane Katrina. Now they are going through a divorce, and their kids, Dallen and Jolie, are caught in the crossfire.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Havana Hot Spots
programme.desc: Guy hits up the hot spots in Havana, Cuba. A neighborhood joint cooks up house-cured lamb and freshly-caught snapper. A house-turned-restaurant dishes out savory goat stew and Chinese fried rice.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: A Sampling Of Spain
programme.desc: Guy Fieri travels all the way to Barcelona, Spain, for a sampling of Spanish cooking. He digs into everything from top-notch tapas, like prawns and quail, to traditional Catalan specialties, like mouth-watering meatballs.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Far East Flavorfest
programme.desc: Guy Fieri cruises the States to check out some Far-East flavours. In Seattle, a funky chicken spot puts an Asian spin on poultry. A family-run gem dishes out righteous Thai specialties on the big island of Hawaii.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Meat in the Middle
programme.desc: Guy is grabbing dishes stacked and stuffed with off-the-hook goodness. In Baltimore, he checks out the pasta bar rolling out delicious ravioli and topping things off with their killer clams.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Poke, Pork and Chicken Parm
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's checking in on some of his favourite joints serving up a bite for any time of day. In Chicago, things have changed a lot for Guy's poke buddies. In Denver, a triple threat is adding some new biscuit sandwiches and late-night Italian options.

programme.title: Tournament of Champions: The Tournament Begins

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Tacos, Turtles and Tri-Tip

programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri's playing a tasty game of chicken all over the country. In Alameda, Calif., a joint is cookin' it Nashville hot-style and putting a gourmet twist on a burger. In Lansing, Mich., the bird is served French-style at a pizza joint.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Tacos, Turtles and Tri-Tip
programme.desc: Guy tries pork belly tacos and carne adovada in a high-energy marketplace.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Meat in the Middle
programme.desc: Guy is grabbing dishes stacked and stuffed with off-the-hook goodness. In Baltimore, he checks out the pasta bar rolling out delicious ravioli and topping things off with their killer clams.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Poke, Pork and Chicken Parm
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's checking in on some of his favourite joints serving up a bite for any time of day. In Chicago, things have changed a lot for Guy's poke buddies. In Denver, a triple threat is adding some new biscuit sandwiches and late-night Italian options.

programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: Eggs
programme.desc: It's eggs all the way in an incredible master class, featuring them both soft boiled and in the dressing of a fantastic Caesar salad with Blue cheese and bacon. Egg whites are whipped to perfection for a Pavlova fruit tart.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Wake Up Your Sweet Tooth
programme.desc: Bobby Flay and guest Sunny Anderson tackle the sweet side of brunch with creme brulee French toast with drunken strawberries, Sunny's sambal and pineapple glazed bacon, blueberry pancake bites and sparkling iced espresso.

programme.title: Guy's Ranch Kitchen: Retro Reboot
programme.desc: Guy Fieri brings some of his most creative chef friends to the ranch to revamp dishes that are best described as moldy oldies. Aarti Sequeira uses cardamom to give chicken a la king an Indian makeover. Justin Warner deconstructs and reinvents crab Louie.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Tom's Hometown Favorites
programme.desc: Valerie surprises her Midwestern husband Tom with some of his Ohio favorites. Ohio turkey chili, fried bologna bites with pickled squash, tomato and bibb lettuce salad and vanilla and coffee cream puffs are all on the menu.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Dad's Dinner Delivery
programme.desc: Ree Drummond and her son, Todd, are delivering dinner to her dad and stepmom, so Ree makes an Italian meal of creamy chicken cacciatore soup, parmesan herb drops biscuits and Italian salad with parmesan crisps.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: All in One
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is making non-stop all-in-one wonders! There's a simple chicken and dressing sheet pan supper, lemon, basil and shrimp risotto in a skillet, the easiest ramen pho and a layered portable Greek salad in a jar.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Easy Comfort
programme.desc: Ree Drummond makes comfort food the easy way starting with carrot cake French toast, a tasty combo of two comforting classics in one make-ahead breakfast. There's also corn and green chili chowder made fast in a multi pot, a butterscotch lava cake.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Alone Again
programme.desc: Ree's got the house to herself and is whipping up her favorite eats.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Nick's Trombone Choir
programme.desc: Molly Yeh makes a hearty tomato squash soup and labneh grilled cheese for lunch before husband Nick's trombone practice. Then she sends him off with chewy chocolate peanut butter bars for the whole choir.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Ante Up
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli loves a competitive game night at home, and this time she's going all out by matching her menu to the games for her husband, Tom, and their friends.

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown: BFF Reunion
programme.desc: Back in her school days, Kardea would spend her weekends planning a trip to Mexico with her besties. In honor of that trip that never happened, Kardea creates a Mexican-themed meal.

programme.title: Giada Entertains: Go Green or Go Home
programme.desc: Giada De Laurentiis hosts a St. Patrick's Day party, offering her spin on traditional Irish dishes. Guests will feast on hearty Lamb and Red Wine Stew, Mashed Yukon Gold Potatoes with Savoy Cabbage, plus a Smoked Salmon 'Crudo' with creamy cucumbers.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Weeknight Wonders
programme.desc: Katie Lee makes one-pot beef bourguignon, Jeff Mauro makes a quick and easy eggplant parm, and Geoffrey Zakarian serves up savoury galette.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Best of Pizza
programme.desc: Guy has collected the names of pizza joints that are producing some righteous pies.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Old Faces, New Places
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's visiting some familiar Triple D faces and checking out their new places including a primo pizza joint in Flagstaff, Arizona firing up pies with not-your-everyday toppings.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Arizona All-Stars
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's headin' Southwest for a flavor-filled tour of Scottsdale, Arizona. First, the real deal Italian market making an authentic beef specialty straight from the mother country.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Sammies and Spice
programme.desc: Guy Fieri visits Longmont, Colorado to check out what they're doing with cauliflower and pork burgers. In Columbus, Ohio, a Chicago-style restaurant makes Italian beef and gyros. Aarti Sequeira and Jet Tila meet Guy in Los Angeles for fiery Thai.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: International Appeal
programme.desc: Guy's going on an international flavorfest.

programme.title: Roseanne: Terms of Estrangement
programme.desc: Roseanne and Dan try to keep laughing so they won't start crying as their motorcycle shop goes out of business. Meanwhile, Becky's boyfriend Mark is offered a fabulous job in another state, so they decide to elope.

programme.title: Roseanne: Terms of Estrangement
programme.desc: Roseanne tries to lift Dan's spirits when he feels like a failure over the loss of his motorcycle shop. Also, Becky and Mark return from their elopement to face a bitter Dan and Roseanne.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Ate the Hamburgers, Wearing the Hats
programme.desc: Alan offends Charlie by selecting their crazy cousins as Jake's legal guardians in case of emergency. When Jake suffers an injury, Charlie races to prove he can be a responsible guardian.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: An Old Flame With a New Wick
programme.desc: Charlie agrees to meet with a former girlfriend who broke his heart, but he is in for a surprise when he discovers that she is now a man named Bill. After managing to overcome his shock, Charlie's new friendship is jeopardized when Bill dates Evelyn.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: I Remember the Coatroom, I Just Don't Remember You
programme.desc: Judith's sister, Liz, hits on Alan at Jake's party despite having a history with Charlie. Meanwhile, Evelyn celebrates Jake's birthday in her own way.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Hey, I Can Pee Outside in the Dark
programme.desc: Jake continuously plays 'Smoke on the Water' on his guitar and has developed a grumpy attitude. Alan tries a father/son chat, Charlie offers a jam session and Berta thinks Jake is just constipated.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: No Sniffing, No Wowing
programme.desc: Alan takes Charlie to meet with his divorce attorney, Laura, after Judith expresses concern that Charlie is a bad influence on Jake. Laura is open to Charlie's other relationships, but takes advantage of her request that he be available at any time.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: My Doctor Has a Cow Puppet
programme.desc: Alan finally succumbs to Judith's demand that he take Jake to therapy and realizes he has been sleepwalking. After Evelyn tells Charlie that Alan used to sleepwalk as a child, Charlie believes he has a solution.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Just Like Buffalo
programme.desc: When Jake imitates one of Charlie's sexist remarks, Judith's support group decides that Charlie's home is an unfit environment for the child. Charlie is forced to cajole the group into letting Jake continue to spend the weekends at his place.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Can You Feel My Finger?
programme.desc: After Charlie has yet another pregnancy scare, Alan suggests he get a vasectomy. Charlie's doctor recommends freezing some sperm in case he changes his mind about having children, but things don't go quite as planned.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Back Off, Mary Poppins
programme.desc: When Alan learns that Charlie belongs to an exclusive male support group, he begs to join.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Enjoy Those Garlic Balls
programme.desc: Alan attempts to push Judith's new relationship with Dr. Melnick to the next level.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: A Bag Full of Jawea
programme.desc: Charlie attempts to keep Jake from being suspended from school by wooing his teacher.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Go Get Mommy's Bra
programme.desc: Charlie agrees to trade cars with his mother for a day and ends up with major regrets.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Bad News From the Clinic?
programme.desc: Charlie falls head over heals for a woman who plays hard to get better than he does.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: The Price of Healthy Gums Is Eternal Vigilance
programme.desc: Alan's self image is shaken when Charlie admits to having played a dirty trick on him.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: A Kosher Slaughterhouse Out in Fontana
programme.desc: To be a good example for Jake, who has been disrespectful lately to his mother, Charlie and Alan grudgingly agree to throw their own mother a party to celebrate her real estate achievements.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Frankenstein and the Horny Villagers
programme.desc: Alan meets an attractive woman who introduces him to the kind of sex Charlie is accustomed to.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Yes, Monsignor
programme.desc: Charlie's ex-flame returns to his life with a little more baggage than when she left.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: The Salmon Under My Sweater
programme.desc: While Jake helps Charlie write a cartoon theme song, things heat up between Alan and Rose.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Hair

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: He Ain't Heavy
programme.desc: In her attempt to help Matthew lose weight using her know-how as the owner of a gym, Christine finds herself unable to shed the extra pounds she's put on.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: The Old Maid of Honor

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Love: A Cautionary Tale
programme.desc: Christine learns some shocking news about New Christine's father after the two of them rekindle their relationship at Richard's and New Christine's wedding.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Bahamian Rhapsody
programme.desc: After Barb was thrown in jail by immigration during Richard's and New Christine's disastrous wedding, Christine and Matthew head to the Bahamas to try to get her an illegal visa.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Burning Love
programme.desc: Christine and Richard are stunned when they meet up with some old college buddies and realize how much they have aged.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Once in St. Olaf
programme.desc: Rose makes a stunning discovery while admitting a patient at the hospital. Meanwhile, Sophia has to have surgery, but a mix-up occurs after the operation and Sophia becomes lost in the hospital.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: If at Last You Do Succeed
programme.desc: Stan has finally hit it big with a new invention, but still Dorothy can't be happy for him. Meanwhile, Rose and Blanche fight over some war bonds that, if cashed, could bankrupt St. Olaf.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Snap Out of It
programme.desc: Blanche is dreading her birthday and Dorothy helps Sophia with 'Meals on Wheels.'

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Wham, Bam, Thank You, Mammy

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Feelings
programme.desc: Dorothy resists pressure to pass a failing student-athlete and Rose accuses her dentist.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Zborn Again
programme.desc: Sophia tries once again to dissuade Dorothy from reconciling with her ex-husband Stan.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: How Do You Solve a Problem Like Sophia
programme.desc: Sophia decides to join a convent after her favourite nun, Sister Agnes, dies.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Mrs. George Devereaux
programme.desc: Blanche has a dream in which she is visited by her deceased husband, George Devereaux.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Girls Just Wanna Have Fun..Before They Die
programme.desc: Blanche tries to help Sophia seduce her date; Rose's relationship with Miles is affected.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Stand by Your Man

programme.desc: Don unearths four dummy heads that helped three inmates escape from Alcatraz, examines the medical mystery that defined a famous pair of conjoined twins and investigates the attempted robbery of Abraham Lincoln's grave in Springfield, Illinois.

programme.title: Beyond the Unknown: Donner Party, Skinwalker Ranch and Houdini
programme.desc: Don Wildman recounts the tragic tale of the most infamous expedition in history, uncovers evidence suggesting that Harry Houdini was murdered, and investigates a shapeshifting creature said to stalk a secluded ranch in Utah.

programme.title: The Alaska Triangle: Portal in the Triangle and Bigfoot Was Here

programme.title: The Alaska Triangle: UFO Water Rising/ Aliens vs. Airplanes
programme.desc: Compelling evidence suggests extraterrestrials are hiding beneath the ocean's surface. One of the most-famous UFO cases of all time occurs in the skies above Alaska when an unidentified flying object chases down a Japanese cargo plane.

programme.title: The Alaska Triangle: Supernatural Hotel/ Mystery of a Sunken Ship
programme.desc: A vicious spirit attacks female guests at a historic hotel in Juneau, Alaska, and a paranormal investigator searches for answers to a mysterious shipwreck off the Alaskan coast.

programme.title: Movie: Walk the Line

programme.title: The Simpsons: Million Dollar Maybe

programme.title: The Simpsons: The D'oh-cial Network

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Girl Code
programme.desc: After a photo Marge posts on social media gets Homer fired, he returns to the best job he ever had, a dishwasher at a Greek restaurant. This same post inspires Lisa to code an app that predicts the real-life consequences of anything you post online.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Looking for Mr. Goodbart

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: South America
programme.desc: A look at the most species rich continent on Earth: South America. In the Andes, pumas hunt guanaco while rarely seen bears search for mini avocados. In the Amazon, poison dart frogs care for their babies and colourful macaws eat clay.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: Asia
programme.desc: Visit the planet's largest continent. In the frozen north, walrus congregate in extraordinary numbers, bears gather inside volcanoes and yeti-like monkeys fight in the remote forests of China. In the tropical south, the last few Sumatran rhino roam.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: Europe
programme.desc: Europe is where wildlife survives alongside people. In Gibraltar, a baby monkey is kidnapped, while in the cemeteries of Vienna grave robbing wild hamsters fight. In this fairy tale continent wolves roam the forests and dragons lurk in caves.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: Antarctica
programme.desc: Only the strong can survive in Antarctica, the world's most hostile continent. Elephant seals battle for territories, king penguins gather in colonies, and great whales feast on krill bait.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: Africa
programme.desc: Even in Africa, home of the greatest wildlife gatherings on Earth, wildlife faces many challenges.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: The Making Of

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: Australia

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: North America

programme.desc: A single mother and her daughter are delighted when a single dad and his two daughters move in next door. They become fast friends until molestation charges send their relationship spiralling into anger, accusation, and eventually multiple bloody deaths.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Deadly Duplex
programme.desc: After an early retirement, a man buys a duplex and rents half of it out to a troubled family. With the help of his gun, he sends an abusive husband packing and sets his sights on the wife.

programme.title: The Devil Went to Georgia
programme.desc: A home invasion forces a Southern Belle to fight for her life in a bizarre case involving inheritance money and mistaken identity.

programme.desc: America's first female serial killer wrote down her darkest secrets for her best friend while on Florida's death row. Now, for the first time, those secrets are revealed in detail as the written words of Aileen Wuornos tell us what really happened.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: In Plain Sight
programme.desc: When a sexual predator is discovered hiding in plain sight, John helps police in the pursuit of dangerous James Meece; after a brutal home invasion, Cal goes into the field to help police track down the dangerous James Watts.
