programme.title: Pawn Stars: Comfortably Chum
programme.desc: A big-time car dealer drops by the shop, and Rick's negotiation skills are put to the test.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Mac and C.H.E.E.S.E.
programme.desc: Joey rehearses for a role as a detective who solves crimes with his robot partner.

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Ross Meets Elizabeth's Dad
programme.desc: The attractive widowed father of Ross's new girlfriend makes a big impression on Rachel.

programme.title: Black-ish: Black Santa/ White Christmas
programme.desc: Dre campaigns to be the new Santa at the annual office Christmas party, but when that honour goes to Angelica, the lovely head of HR, he goes to great lengths to unseat her because he’s convinced Stevens and Lido need a black Santa.

programme.title: Black-ish: Stand Up, Fall Down
programme.desc: Junior hasn’t been doing much at home during his gap year, so Dre decides to put him to work as an intern.

programme.title: Batwoman: Grinning From Ear to Ear
programme.desc: Batwoman and Luke are on the trail of a villain targeting social media mavens. Sophie gets a visit from her mother. Mary offers her expertise to assist Kate. Jacob Kane is approached to make good on a favour. Alice focuses on her plans for retribution.

programme.title: Supergirl: The Bodyguard
programme.desc: Lex tasks Supergirl with protecting Andrea from an anti-tech extremist, but his nefarious purpose goes beyond merely keeping Andrea alive. Meanwhile, Lena moves forward with Non Nocere, with Lex's help.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Fatigues
programme.desc: Jerry is intrigued by the concept of his girlfriend having a mentor. Elaine has trouble firing an employee and ends up promoting him. Kramer turns to Frank for advice on cooking. George has trouble reading a book on risk management.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Checks
programme.desc: When hundreds of small royalty checks pour in from a Japanese television show, Jerry and George decide to adapt their pilot idea for Japanese television. Kramer entertains Japanese businessmen and has them sleeping in a chest of drawers.

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Paul's the Man
programme.desc: The father of Ross's coed girlfriend threatens to have him fired for dating a student.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Ring
programme.desc: Chandler takes a chance when he secretly asks Phoebe to help him choose a special ring.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Coming Out Party
programme.desc: When Caroline's grandmother Astrid awakens from a coma with no knowledge of her family's massive money scandal, Caroline attempts to keep the truth hidden for a bit longer by giving her one last fancy luncheon.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Basketball Jones
programme.desc: Oleg's pro-basketball-playing cousin comes to town to play a game against Max's favourite team and gifts her with two free tickets. While at the game, chaos ensues when the girls interfere with the game and risk ruining their business's reputation.

programme.title: Entertainers With Byron Allen
programme.desc: Segment features Keri Russell, Tom Hanks, Idina Menzel, Imogen Poots, Katherine Langford and Jaeden Martell, Dennis Quaid, Kristin Key, Sienna Miller, Daniel Kaluuya, Jennifer Lopez, and Jonas Brothers.

programme.title: Just for Laughs: Gags: Nothing Up His Cape
programme.desc: Magical pranks, lobster launch, and really fast food are some of the gags.

programme.title: Just for Laughs: Gags: Above Par Pranks
programme.desc: Gags include smothered in laughs, hysterical pregnancy, and quit golfing around.

programme.title: Funny You Should Ask
programme.desc: Guest stars include Jon Lovitz, Sherri Shepherd, Louie Anderson, Byron Allen, Natasha Leggero, and Jamie Kennedy.

programme.title: Couples Court With the Cutlers: Cerda vs. Reyes
programme.desc: After secretly getting married to her child’s father, a woman suspects her husband is cheating after discovering condoms and earrings in his car.

programme.title: America's Court With Judge Ross: Karate Karaoke/ Phone Takes a Plung
programme.desc: Former judge Kevin Ross presides over various small claims cases.

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: Gambling Debt/ Don't Go Breaking My Art
programme.desc: Judge Mablean Ephriam handles justice her way.

programme.title: Right This Minute
programme.desc: Stay up-to-date with the most viral videos online.

programme.title: Daily Mail TV
programme.desc: Your number one source for celebrity news, gossip and photos.

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court: Jones vs. Turner
programme.desc: His girlfriend showed signs of promiscuous behaviour around the time of her five-month-old son’s conception, so the Plaintiff has come to Paternity Court to find out the truth.

programme.title: The Verdict With Judge Hatchett: Hand Me Down Hate/ The Raccoon Robbed Me!
programme.desc: A plaintiff sues for the cost of artwork. A man sues the manager of golf course for property damage.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Pregnant and Pissed
programme.desc: Ajia says her boyfriend John’s past is coming back to haunt her. She’s six months pregnant with their child and but wants to know why he’s flirting with his female friend Hailey.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: A woman claims that a man fathered her children, but put everything else above them. The man says he has doubts about fathering the kids, so he has petitioned the court for a paternity test.

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Cases include: Tossing A Tenant, Being Ill Fitting and Restrain That Pit-Bull.

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Cases include 'It's Best Not To But a Boat', 'Bugging a Boyfriend' and 'A Bad Brake.'

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: Hanging on by a Thread/ Fore!
programme.desc: Damage to car; a man is struck by a stray golf ball at a wedding reception.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: A plaintiff is suing her co-worker for damage to her car; the defendant claims worn tires contributed to the collision. Then, a plaintiff is suing for missed rent, property damages and eviction fees.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: What's Really Going on Here?
programme.desc: Stefani says she saw Ashley shake her newborn daughter but Ashley claims Stefani is jealous because Ashley had this baby with Stefani's ex, Aaron.

programme.title: Maury: Shocking DNA ... Is My Twin Brother the Father of This Baby?
programme.desc: Gloria's ex of seven years, Deangelo, is denying all three of their children, because he's been cheated on in the past. Katherine wants to prove to Trent and his twin Tray that he's the father of her baby.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Hand Delivered Secrets
programme.desc: Christine has a written letter from her alleged friend Tasha, confessing to sleeping with her boyfriend Chris.

programme.title: The Mel Robbins Show: I'm Caught Between My Husband and Daughter
programme.desc: Elizabeth feels stuck between her daughter Alli and her new husband Dan. Alli felt blindsided and stabbed in the back by the new marriage.

programme.title: Movie: Long Shot
programme.desc: A free-spirited journalist bumps into his childhood crush, who happens to be running for the Presidency. She impulsively hires him as her speechwriter, and sparks begin to fly between the two childhood friends despite their very different lives.

programme.title: Movie: Bridesmaids
programme.desc: After being picked as her best friend's maid of honour, a broke woman tries to bluff her way through the expensive bridesmaid rituals.

programme.title: High Maintenance
programme.desc: A marijuana deliveryman drops his product off to clients in New York City.

programme.title: Movie: The Station Agent
programme.desc: A man who was born with dwarfism finds his solitude interrupted by a vendor and a woman.

programme.title: Movie: Welcome Home Roxy Carmichael
programme.desc: A small town goes berserk anticipating the return of sexy and mysterious, Roxy Carmichael.

programme.title: Movie: Nine Months
programme.desc: A child psychiatrist panics when his girlfriend announces that she is pregnant.

programme.title: Movie: Jersey Girl
programme.desc: A young father loses his career and his wife and must raise his daughter alone the best way that he can.

programme.title: Movie: The Great White Hype
programme.desc: Boxing promoters stage a fight between a black world champion and a white unknown.

programme.title: Movie: A Thousand Words
programme.desc: After an encounter with a spiritual guru, a literary agent finds an odd tree in his yard that loses a leaf each time the agent speaks.

programme.title: Movie: It's Kind of a Funny Story
programme.desc: After checking himself into an adult psychiatric ward, a clinically depressed teenager gets a fresh start.

programme.title: Movie: Upgrade
programme.desc: After his wife is murdered during a violent mugging that leaves him paralyzed, a man is implanted with an experimental computer chip that not only helps him walk again but also gives him superhuman fighting abilities that he uses to get revenge.

programme.title: Movie: Picture Perfect
programme.desc: In order to get ahead at work, a young advertising executive pretends she's engaged. She must then convince a recent acquaintance to act the part during an important meeting with her boss.

programme.title: Movie: Keeping Up With the Steins
programme.desc: As a young boy's bar mitzvah approaches, he invites his estranged grandfather to stay with the family. As a result, the boy learns what it means to be a man.

programme.title: Movie: A Fish Called Wanda
programme.desc: In London, four very different people team up to commit armed robbery, then try to double-cross each other for the loot. Wanda grows closer to an English lawyer in an attempt to locate the stolen diamonds.

programme.desc: A small town sheriff tries to rescue a girl who he thought was being kidnapped. He learns that the kidnappers are FBI agents who are actually trying to kill the girl.
